homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a correct caption to not have any information absent from the audio. Use the worst score if all the information in the caption is absent from the audio, and use the best score if all the information in the caption is present in the audio.
prompts.1: How complete is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a complete caption to have all relevant information concerning genre, mood, and instrumentation of the audio. Use the worst score if the caption does not have any relevant information on these aspects for the audio, and the best score if the caption contains all relevant information on these aspects for the audio.

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This track is a fast-paced punk rock instrumental driven by an aggressive electric guitar riff and energetic acoustic drumming. The piece exudes a youthful, rebellious vibe suitable for live performances or action sequences in an indie film. Although the upload metadata suggests blues influences, the segment's primary character remains firmly rooted in high-energy rock music.

questions.caption: This instrumental track features a fast, energetic beat driven by synthesizers and electronic drums, creating an exciting atmosphere perfect for dancing. The composition is further enriched by a string section and dynamic sound design, evoking a thrilling mood ideal for high-energy dance parties or action sequences.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends strong electronic and hip-hop influences with a futuristic, energetic vibe perfect for dancing. Powered by a steady rhythm and heavy bassline, the piece features prominent synthesizer work that creates a groovy atmosphere reminiscent of dubstep. The combination of digital sounds and a consistent beat makes it ideal for a nightclub setting or a lively dance party.

questions.caption: This alternative rock track features a male vocalist singing melodically while an electric guitar carries the main melody. The music maintains an easygoing atmosphere supported by background bass lines and acoustic drums, fitting well as background music in a casual setting.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental heavy metal track features a distorted electric guitar driving power chords alongside a fast-paced acoustic drum beat and bass root notes. The music creates an intense, aggressive atmosphere that feels like it could belong in a video game soundtrack or a tense movie scene involving a character under the influence.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This recording features a lively and spirited segment from Stravinsky's "L'Histoire du soldat," showcasing an energetic violin solo supported by a septet with brass and percussion. The fast tempo and dynamic rhythm create an upbeat mood that would fit well within an action-packed film soundtrack, despite some imperfections in the original 1932 audio quality.

questions.description:

CAPTION:
questions.caption: Nameless (UA, Ternopil) presents a groovy, upbeat instrumental track that blends electric guitar and bass with saxophone melodies to create a lively sound. Driven by steady acoustic drums, the music maintains an energetic rhythm reminiscent of blues-rock, offering a perfect soundtrack for a spirited road trip or a bustling bar scene.

A full orchestra, including strings and a choir, creates a steady rhythm that allows the music to feel both cinematic and ethereal. Soft instrumentation like the piano further enhances the calm, immersive atmosphere of the composition.

questions.name: Sample 11
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: An accordion provides the sole instrumental focus in this piece, with the right hand playing chords while the left hand carries the melody. The arrangement creates an upbeat yet nostalgic atmosphere driven entirely by the instrument rather than percussion. Footsteps are audible within the soundscape, adding a realistic layer to the recording of a young musician on the Pont d'Arcole.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
